message:
feat(web): add jargon dictionary health check script

Add comprehensive validation script (scripts/check-jargon-health.ts) that
checks for:
- Duplicate display terms
- Broken/self-referencing related arrays
- Em-dashes and condescending language patterns
- Description length validation
- Invalid transcript section references (§n format)
- Related array size recommendations
- Orphaned terms and asymmetric links
- Missing "why" fields for core categories

Also fixes issues found by the script:
- Remove duplicate "quotebank" entry (keep "quote-bank")
- Fix invalid section reference §319-332 in conversational-science
- Update corpus/page.tsx and OperatorsClient.tsx to use quote-bank

Run: bun run scripts/check-jargon-health.ts [--verbose] [--fix]

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
